title: pinus oocarpa subsp. manzanoi
intro: Pinus oocarpa subsp. manzanoi, also known as the Manzano pine, is a subspecies of the Pinus oocarpa tree, native to Mexico and Central America. The bark of this plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Pinus oocarpa subsp. manzanoi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
